name: Default Dumbbell 6-Day
description: A 6-day push / pull / legs split using only dumbbells. Volume calibrated for sustainability, with a short mobility move on every session.

1.name: Wall Slides
1.description: Back against the wall. Slide arms up and down, keep contact.

1.name: Flat DB Press
1.description: Flat bench. Elbows at 45°, lower under control.

1.name: DB Shoulder Press
1.description: Press overhead, lock the elbows out.

1.name: Lateral Raises
1.description: Slight elbow bend, raise to shoulder height.

1.name: Skull Crushers
1.description: Lying back. Elbows fixed, only forearms move.

1.name: Overhead Triceps
1.description: DB behind the head, elbows tucked in. Single or double arm.

2.name: Cat-Cow
2.description: On hands and knees. Arch and round the spine, slow cycles.

2.name: Bent-Over Row
2.description: Flat back, hips back. Pull toward the belly.

2.name: Single-Arm Row
2.description: One arm. Squeeze the shoulder blade.

2.name: Rear Delt Flies
2.description: Bent over, open arms wide. Squeeze.

2.name: DB Shrugs
2.description: Just shrug the shoulders, arms relaxed.

2.name: Hammer Curls
2.description: Neutral grip, like swinging a hammer.

3.name: Goblet Squats
3.description: DB at the chest. Heels down, hips back.

3.name: DB Hip Thrust
3.description: Upper back on bench, DB on hips. Squeeze glutes at the top.

3.name: Romanian DL
3.description: Push hips back, flat back, soft knees.

3.name: Calf Raises
3.description: Up on the toes, lower under control.

3.name: Plank
3.description: Hold the position. Body in a straight line.

3.name: Leg Raises
3.description: Lying back. Raise legs under control.

3.name: Couch Stretch
3.description: Hip flexor stretch. Hold each leg.

4.name: Wall Slides
4.description: Back against the wall. Slide arms up and down, keep contact.

4.name: Flat DB Press
